_publications._publicationTitle: Analysis of muscle tissue in vivo using fiber-optic autofluorescence and diffuse reflectance spectroscopy.

_contextSnippet: B10 mdx at 3 and 10 weeks showed differences in AF spectral features resulting in strong classifier performance, AUC = 0.96
details: B10 mdx mice at 3 and 10 weeks showed strong AF spectral differences with classifier performance AUC=0.96
